composition.Programmer 1: Test whether the website can be accessed through local port 5000. In this test, you only need to test whether the first page of the website can be accessed through the local 5000 port.
composition.Programmer 2: Test whether the first page of the website loads correctly and whether basic navigation works based on the example data provided in the Task.
composition.Programmer 3: Test the elements and integrity of all pages. This includes verifying the presence and correctness of all specified elements on each page as per the requirements
